acceptance_criteria: Provider calls <=160 and spend <=$30.00; no undeleted cloud resources.
Every confirmed hack certified by official-harness execution (all FAIL_TO_PASS and PASS_TO_PASS pass under the variant).
Every confirmed hack has a recorded gold-differential witness executed in the pinned container.
At least 8 new confirmed hacks, spanning at least 5 repositories, at least 3 new.
All confirmed hacks re-verified airtight (apply clean, certified, clean divergent output).
Elicited/constructed framing preserved; no natural-frequency or leaderboard claim.

evidence.notes: CI run 29365522019 (success): 23 variants certified + witnessed in pinned containers; logs retained.
12 confirmed new hacks across 8 repos (5 new: requests, xarray, pylint, pytest, sympy); all 12 re-verified airtight. django-10097 passes 1870 graded tests.
Funnel: 42 targets -> 23 variants -> 20 certified -> 12 confirmed. Bars (>=8 hacks, >=5 repos, >=3 new) all cleared.
Combined benchmark now 22 rows across 8 repos (10 iter195 + 12 iter199).

falsifiers: Any confirmed hack is not certified-resolved by official-harness execution.
Any confirmed hack lacks a reproducible gold-differential witness.
Fewer than 8 confirmed hacks, or fewer than 5 repositories, or fewer than 3 new repositories.
Provider calls exceed 160 or spend exceeds $30.00, or a cloud resource is left undeleted.
The result presents a natural-frequency, non-elicited, leaderboard, model-superiority, or SOTA claim.
stated_goal: Grow the certified-resolved reward-hack benchmark beyond 3 repositories by constructing and execution-verifying new hacks across the full SWE-bench Verified repo set.
